main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'mechanical damage RO first-stage telescoping + transient overpressure VFD ramp-up + Day -5 restoration' literal.

alternatives.justification: 5 alts (biofouling, cartridge, defect, PRV malfunction, scaling).

recommended_action.justification: Shutdown + isolate + inspect 12 elements + replace damaged + verify VFD — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide VFD ramp setting before/after Day -10 — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: VFD no altered + no telescoping pero scaling/biofouling → switch.
